name: Claude Opus 4.1
note: Incremental Opus 4 upgrade improving agentic coding, refactoring and reasoning benchmarks; drop-in replacement at same price.

results.notes: SWE-bench Verified, up from 72.5% on Opus 4; confirmed via direct fetch of InfoQ article

Terminal-bench; original InfoQ sourceUrl did not contain this figure in extracted text (only SWE-bench and safety metrics were present), so sourceUrl swapped to Winbuzzer, which explicitly lists 43.3%
AIME 2025, up from 75.5% on Opus 4; same sourceUrl correction as Terminal-bench row, confirmed 78.0% on Winbuzzer
GPQA Diamond, up from 79.6% on Opus 4; same sourceUrl correction, confirmed 80.9% on Winbuzzer

verificationNotes: Real model, confirmed via anthropic.com/news/claude-opus-4-1 and Anthropic's X announcement (release 2025-08-05, same $15/$75 pricing as Opus 4, 200K context). SWE-bench 74.5% confirmed on InfoQ; the other 3 rows (Terminal-bench 43.3%, AIME 78%, GPQA 80.9%) were not literally present in the InfoQ text extraction, so sourceUrl was swapped to Winbuzzer's article, which explicitly lists all four figures. Per Anthropic's official model-deprecations page (fetched 2026-07-12): claude-opus-4-1-20250805 is currently 'Deprecated' (as of 2026-06-05) with tentative retirement 2026-08-05, which has NOT yet passed as of today (2026-07-12) — status='deprecated' and apiAvailable=true both confirmed correct as given.
